DTS:Variable.DTS:Expression:
";with new_notes_cte as ( select comm_time_objid , creation_time , sla_duration , next_update_duration , next_update , case_objid , note_objid , user_objid , dw_last_modify_dt from dbo.case_comm_time_stage where dw_last_modify_dt >= '" + (DT_WSTR, 30) @[User::max_dw_last_modify_dt] + "' )
, case_note_union_cte as ( select comm_time_objid , creation_time , sla_duration , next_update_duration , next_update , case_objid , note_objid , user_objid , dw_last_modify_dt from new_notes_cte
union
select comm_time_objid , note_creation_time , default_sla_duration_secs , next_update_duration_secs , next_update , case_objid , note_objid , user_objid , dw_last_modify_dt from dbo.case_variable_comm_detail d where dateadd(dd, 0, datediff(dd, 0, dw_last_modify_dt)) < '" + (DT_WSTR, 30) @[User::max_dw_last_modify_dt] + "' and exists (select 1 from new_notes_cte where case_objid = d.case_objid) )
, workgroup_cte as ( select Field_Name , Value , Wrk_Grp_Region , Wrk_Grp_Technology , Mod_Dt , [Grouping] , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Field_Name ORDER BY Mod_Dt DESC) AS row_count from dbo.CLARSUPP_TABLE_WFM_REGION_TECHNOLOGY where [Grouping] = 'Work_Group_Region_Vertical' )
SELECT t.comm_time_objid , t.case_objid , c.case_id , c.case_type , t.CREATION_TIME as note_creation_time , t.SLA_DURATION as default_sla_duration_secs , t.NEXT_UPDATE_DURATION as next_update_duration_secs , t.next_update , t.note_objid , t.user_objid , e.x_nt_login_id as user_nt_login_id , u.LOGIN_NAME as user_login_name , e.last_name as user_first_name , e.first_name as user_last_name , e.work_group as user_work_group , gal_sup.FULL_NAME as user_supervisor_name , wrt.Wrk_Grp_Technology as user_work_group_technology , wrt.Wrk_Grp_Region as user_work_group_region , row_number() over (partition by c.case_id order by t.comm_time_objid) as case_comm_order , LAG(t.CREATION_TIME,1,NULL) OVER (partition by c.CASE_ID order by t.CREATION_TIME) as prev_note_creation_time , LAG(t.NEXT_UPDATE,1,NULL) OVER (partition by c.CASE_ID order by t.CREATION_TIME) as prev_next_update , LAG(t.NEXT_UPDATE_DURATION,1,NULL) OVER (partition by c.CASE_ID order by t.CREATION_TIME) as prev_next_update_duration_secs , LEAD(t.CREATION_TIME,1,NULL) OVER (partition by c.CASE_ID order by t.CREATION_TIME) as sub_note_creation_time , LEAD(t.NEXT_UPDATE,1,NULL) OVER (partition by c.CASE_ID order by t.CREATION_TIME) as sub_next_update , LEAD(t.NEXT_UPDATE_DURATION,1,NULL) OVER (partition by c.CASE_ID order by t.CREATION_TIME) as sub_next_update_duration_secs , CASE WHEN t.SLA_DURATION <> t.NEXT_UPDATE_DURATION THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as default_sla_override , CASE WHEN t.SLA_DURATION < t.NEXT_UPDATE_DURATION THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as default_sla_override_more , CASE WHEN t.SLA_DURATION > t.NEXT_UPDATE_DURATION THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as default_sla_override_less , CASE WHEN t.NEXT_UPDATE = 'Awaiting Customer Reply' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as awaiting_cust_reply_update , CASE WHEN t.NEXT_UPDATE = 'None Currently Planned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as none_currently_planned_update , CASE WHEN t.NEXT_UPDATE = 'Ticket set to Auto Close' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as ticket_auto_close_update , CASE WHEN t.NEXT_UPDATE = 'Ticket Closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as ticket_close_update , t.DW_LAST_MODIFY_DT FROM case_note_union_cte t INNER JOIN dbo.GNOC_METRIC_MAIN_COMBINED c ON t.CASE_OBJID = c.CASE_OBJID LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.CLARSUPP_TABLE_EMPLOYEE e ON t.USER_OBJID = e.employee2user LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.CLARSUPP_TABLE_USER u ON e.employee2user = u.OBJID LEFT OUTER JOIN workgroup_cte wrt ON e.work_group = wrt.Field_Name and wrt.row_count = 1 LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.GALCapture gal_tech ON gal_tech.NT_LOGIN = e.x_nt_login_id LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.GALCapture gal_sup ON gal_tech.supervisor_person_id = gal_sup.PERSON_ID"
DTS:Variable.DTS:VariableValue:
;with new_notes_cte as ( select comm_time_objid , creation_time , sla_duration , next_update_duration , next_update , case_objid , note_objid , user_objid , dw_last_modify_dt from dbo.case_comm_time_stage where dw_last_modify_dt >= '1/1/1900' )
, case_note_union_cte as ( select comm_time_objid , creation_time , sla_duration , next_update_duration , next_update , case_objid , note_objid , user_objid , dw_last_modify_dt from new_notes_cte
union
select comm_time_objid , note_creation_time , default_sla_duration_secs , next_update_duration_secs , next_update , case_objid , note_objid , user_objid , dw_last_modify_dt from dbo.case_variable_comm_detail d where dateadd(dd, 0, datediff(dd, 0, dw_last_modify_dt)) < '1/1/1900' and exists (select 1 from new_notes_cte where case_objid = d.case_objid) )
, workgroup_cte as ( select Field_Name , Value , Wrk_Grp_Region , Wrk_Grp_Technology , Mod_Dt , [Grouping] , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Field_Name ORDER BY Mod_Dt DESC) AS row_count from dbo.CLARSUPP_TABLE_WFM_REGION_TECHNOLOGY where [Grouping] = 'Work_Group_Region_Vertical' )
SELECT t.comm_time_objid , t.case_objid , c.case_id , c.case_type , t.CREATION_TIME as note_creation_time , t.SLA_DURATION as default_sla_duration_secs , t.NEXT_UPDATE_DURATION as next_update_duration_secs , t.next_update , t.note_objid , t.user_objid , e.x_nt_login_id as user_nt_login_id , u.LOGIN_NAME as user_login_name , e.last_name as user_first_name , e.first_name as user_last_name , e.work_group as user_work_group , gal_sup.FULL_NAME as user_supervisor_name , wrt.Wrk_Grp_Technology as user_work_group_technology , wrt.Wrk_Grp_Region as user_work_group_region , row_number() over (partition by c.case_id order by t.comm_time_objid) as case_comm_order , LAG(t.CREATION_TIME,1,NULL) OVER (partition by c.CASE_ID order by t.CREATION_TIME) as prev_note_creation_time , LAG(t.NEXT_UPDATE,1,NULL) OVER (partition by c.CASE_ID order by t.CREATION_TIME) as prev_next_update , LAG(t.NEXT_UPDATE_DURATION,1,NULL) OVER (partition by c.CASE_ID order by t.CREATION_TIME) as prev_next_update_duration_secs , LEAD(t.CREATION_TIME,1,NULL) OVER (partition by c.CASE_ID order by t.CREATION_TIME) as sub_note_creation_time , LEAD(t.NEXT_UPDATE,1,NULL) OVER (partition by c.CASE_ID order by t.CREATION_TIME) as sub_next_update , LEAD(t.NEXT_UPDATE_DURATION,1,NULL) OVER (partition by c.CASE_ID order by t.CREATION_TIME) as sub_next_update_duration_secs , CASE WHEN t.SLA_DURATION <> t.NEXT_UPDATE_DURATION THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as default_sla_override , CASE WHEN t.SLA_DURATION < t.NEXT_UPDATE_DURATION THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as default_sla_override_more , CASE WHEN t.SLA_DURATION > t.NEXT_UPDATE_DURATION THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as default_sla_override_less , CASE WHEN t.NEXT_UPDATE = 'Awaiting Customer Reply' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as awaiting_cust_reply_update , CASE WHEN t.NEXT_UPDATE = 'None Currently Planned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as none_currently_planned_update , CASE WHEN t.NEXT_UPDATE = 'Ticket set to Auto Close' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as ticket_auto_close_update , CASE WHEN t.NEXT_UPDATE = 'Ticket Closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as ticket_close_update , t.DW_LAST_MODIFY_DT FROM case_note_union_cte t INNER JOIN dbo.GNOC_METRIC_MAIN_COMBINED c ON t.CASE_OBJID = c.CASE_OBJID LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.CLARSUPP_TABLE_EMPLOYEE e ON t.USER_OBJID = e.employee2user LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.CLARSUPP_TABLE_USER u ON e.employee2user = u.OBJID LEFT OUTER JOIN workgroup_cte wrt ON e.work_group = wrt.Field_Name and wrt.row_count = 1 LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.GALCapture gal_tech ON gal_tech.NT_LOGIN = e.x_nt_login_id LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.GALCapture gal_sup ON gal_tech.supervisor_person_id = gal_sup.PERSON_ID

DTS:Variable.DTS:Expression: "select ct.w_case_comm_time_key_id , ct.comm_time_objid , ct.creation_time , ct.sla_duration , ct.next_update_duration , ct.next_update , ct.case_objid , ct.note_objid , ct.user_objid , ct.dw_create_dt , ct.dw_last_modify_dt , ct.dw_source_system_cd , CASE WHEN ct.SLA_DURATION <> ct.NEXT_UPDATE_DURATION THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as default_sla_override , CASE WHEN ct.SLA_DURATION < ct.NEXT_UPDATE_DURATION THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as default_sla_override_more , CASE WHEN ct.SLA_DURATION > ct.NEXT_UPDATE_DURATION THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as default_sla_override_less , CASE WHEN ct.NEXT_UPDATE = 'Awaiting Customer Reply' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as awaiting_cust_reply_update , CASE WHEN ct.NEXT_UPDATE = 'None Currently Planned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as none_currently_planned_update , CASE WHEN ct.NEXT_UPDATE in ('Ticket Set to Auto Close','Ticket set to Auto Close') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as ticket_auto_close_update , CASE WHEN ct.NEXT_UPDATE = 'Ticket Closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as ticket_close_update ,sysdate as created_date ,nvl(c.dw_secure_company_nbr,0) dw_secure_company_nbr from dsl_sm.w_case_comm_time ct inner join dsl_sm.w_case c on c.case_objid=ct.case_objid and c.reporting_type='Opened' where trunc(ct.dw_last_modify_dt) >= to_date('" + (dt_wstr, 30) @[User::vMxDt] + "','mm/dd/yyyy HH:MI:SS AM')"
DTS:Variable.DTS:VariableValue: select ct.w_case_comm_time_key_id , ct.comm_time_objid , ct.creation_time , ct.sla_duration , ct.next_update_duration , ct.next_update , ct.case_objid , ct.note_objid , ct.user_objid , ct.dw_create_dt , ct.dw_last_modify_dt , ct.dw_source_system_cd , CASE WHEN ct.SLA_DURATION <> ct.NEXT_UPDATE_DURATION THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as default_sla_override , CASE WHEN ct.SLA_DURATION < ct.NEXT_UPDATE_DURATION THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as default_sla_override_more , CASE WHEN ct.SLA_DURATION > ct.NEXT_UPDATE_DURATION THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as default_sla_override_less , CASE WHEN ct.NEXT_UPDATE = 'Awaiting Customer Reply' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as awaiting_cust_reply_update , CASE WHEN ct.NEXT_UPDATE = 'None Currently Planned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as none_currently_planned_update , CASE WHEN ct.NEXT_UPDATE in ('Ticket Set to Auto Close','Ticket set to Auto Close') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as ticket_auto_close_update , CASE WHEN ct.NEXT_UPDATE = 'Ticket Closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as ticket_close_update ,sysdate as created_date ,nvl(c.dw_secure_company_nbr,0) dw_secure_company_nbr from dsl_sm.w_case_comm_time ct inner join dsl_sm.w_case c on c.case_objid=ct.case_objid and c.reporting_type='Opened' where trunc(ct.dw_last_modify_dt) >= to_date('1/1/1900','mm/dd/yyyy HH:MI:SS AM')

component.refId: Package\Incremental Load and Attribute Update\DFT Load Case Comm Time Stage\Upsert Destination (Insert, Update, Delete)
component.contactInfo: Upsert Destination (Insert, Update, Delete); ZappySys LLC (c) All Rights Reserved; SSIS PowerPack; http://www.zappysys.com/support
component.description: Upsert destination can be used for bulk insert / update / delete (i.e. Merge) based on matching source and target records in MS SQL Server, PostgreSql, Amazon Redshift database.
component.name: Upsert Destination (Insert, Update, Delete)

property.description: LoggingMode determines how much information is logged during Package Execution. Set Logging mode to Debugging for maximum log.
property.name: LoggingMode

property.description: When you enable this property it will prefix timestamp before Log messages.
property.name: PrefixTimestamp

property.description: Enable / Disable Response Output. Checking this option can remove unwanted warnings about unused Columns and many times speedup performance so if output is not needed set this option to True so its removed.
property.name: DoNotCreateOutputs

property.description: Target table name where you like insert, update or delete records
property.name: TableName

property.description: Commit batch size (0=Commit once all source rows are consumed). You can Change Batch Size to commit in smaller chunks too if error handling needed.
property.name: BatchSize

property.description: Action you like to perform (e.g. Upsert, Insert, Update, Delete or Sync)
property.name: Action

property.description: INSERT source rows to target if they don't exist in target table (Only for Sync or Upsert Action)
property.name: EnableInsert

property.description: UPDATE source rows to target if they exist in target table (Only for Sync or Upsert Action)
property.name: EnableUpdate

property.description: DELETE target rows if missing in source (Only for Sync or Upsert Action)
property.name: EnableDelete

property.description: User defined Temp table to hold source result before final merge. This table is truncated before each data load. Unlike auto temp table, custom temp table is not dropped after process is finished.
property.name: CustomTempTableName

property.description: SQL command you like to execute after source data is loaded into temp table. For example you can use this option to issue Custom SQL to delete duplicate rows from Staging Table right before final merge. This command is executed before issuing final merge on target table. Along with variable placeholders, you can also use special placeholders [%target_table%], [%temp_table%] and [%target_keys%]
property.name: TempPostExecuteCommand

property.description: SQL command you like to execute before starting load in target table (e.g. DROP INDEX on target). Along with variable placeholders, you can also use special placeholders [%target_table%], [%temp_table%] and [%target_keys%]
property.name: PreExecuteCommand

property.description: SQL command you like to execute at the end once target table is update (e.g. REBUILD or CREATE INDEX on target table). Along with variable placeholders, you can also use special placeholders [%target_table%], [%temp_table%] and [%target_keys%]
property.name: PostExecuteCommand

property.description: Specifies what to do if you encounter duplicate records in source data. You can use first row in the group or keep last row or throw error.
property.name: DuplicateRemovalMode

DTS:Executable.DTS:refId: Package\Incremental Load and Attribute Update\Get Last Modify Dt - Case Comm
DTS:Executable.DTS:ObjectName: Get Last Modify Dt - Case Comm
DTS:Executable.DTS:TaskContact: Execute SQL Task; Microsoft Corporation; SQL Server 2016; © 2015 Microsoft Corporation; All Rights Reserved;http://www.microsoft.com/sql/support/default.asp;1

SQLTask:SqlTaskData.SQLTask:SqlStatementSource:
select max(dateadd(dd, -3, datediff(dd, 0, dw_last_modify_dt))) as MxDt from dbo.case_variable_comm_detail;
--SELECT DATEADD(Month, DATEDIFF(Month, 0, DATEADD(m, -12, GETDATE())), 0) as MxDt;
